note: Basel VaR backtesting traffic-light exception count + zone + multiplier lookup (BANK-K-VARBT-1). Vector 1: full-window GREEN. Vector 2: full-window YELLOW stepped multiplier. Vector 3: partial-window RED, exercises full_window=false + PARTIAL_WINDOW_UNDER_250_DAYS flag.

vectors.name: green_zone_full_window_three_exceptions
vectors.description: Full 250-trading-day window, 3 exceptions -- GREEN zone, base 3.00 multiplier.

output_payload.source: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision, Amendment to the Capital Accord to Incorporate Market Risks (Jan 1996), Part V, "The Basel Committee's backtesting framework" -- 250 trading-day rolling window comparing actual daily P&L against the 99% 1-day VaR estimate; green (0-4 exceptions, multiplier 3.00), yellow (5-9 exceptions, stepped multiplier 3.40-3.85), red (10+ exceptions, multiplier 4.00 floor). Retained under BCBS d457 "Minimum capital requirements for market risk" (Jan 2019) internal-models-approach backtesting provisions.
output_payload.disambiguation: compute_var_backtest_traffic_light performs ONLY the Basel traffic-light exception count + zone + multiplier lookup over a supplied <=250-trading-day P&L/VaR series. It does NOT compute VaR itself, does NOT apply the multiplier to a capital charge (RWA/capital math is left to the bank's market-risk capital engine), and is not a hypothetical-vs-actual P&L attribution tool.

vectors.name: yellow_zone_full_window_seven_exceptions
vectors.description: Full 250-trading-day window, 7 exceptions -- YELLOW zone, stepped 3.65 multiplier.

output_payload.source: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision, Amendment to the Capital Accord to Incorporate Market Risks (Jan 1996), Part V, "The Basel Committee's backtesting framework" -- 250 trading-day rolling window comparing actual daily P&L against the 99% 1-day VaR estimate; green (0-4 exceptions, multiplier 3.00), yellow (5-9 exceptions, stepped multiplier 3.40-3.85), red (10+ exceptions, multiplier 4.00 floor). Retained under BCBS d457 "Minimum capital requirements for market risk" (Jan 2019) internal-models-approach backtesting provisions.
output_payload.disambiguation: compute_var_backtest_traffic_light performs ONLY the Basel traffic-light exception count + zone + multiplier lookup over a supplied <=250-trading-day P&L/VaR series. It does NOT compute VaR itself, does NOT apply the multiplier to a capital charge (RWA/capital math is left to the bank's market-risk capital engine), and is not a hypothetical-vs-actual P&L attribution tool.

vectors.name: red_zone_partial_window_twelve_exceptions
vectors.description: Partial 60-day window (model too new for full 250 days), 12 exceptions -- RED zone, 4.00 floor multiplier, full_window false.

output_payload.source: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision, Amendment to the Capital Accord to Incorporate Market Risks (Jan 1996), Part V, "The Basel Committee's backtesting framework" -- 250 trading-day rolling window comparing actual daily P&L against the 99% 1-day VaR estimate; green (0-4 exceptions, multiplier 3.00), yellow (5-9 exceptions, stepped multiplier 3.40-3.85), red (10+ exceptions, multiplier 4.00 floor). It does NOT compute VaR itself, does NOT apply the multiplier to a capital charge (RWA/capital math is left to the bank's market-risk capital engine), and is not a hypothetical-vs-actual P&L attribution tool.
